description:
Offered: every other year
Surveys pre-Columbian times to the present-day, beginning with indigenous background and continuing through conquest, colonialism and the century of social unrest that began with the struggle for independence in 1810. Concludes by considering the Mexican Revolution and its implications for Mexico’s contemporary political and social stability and economic development.
Prerequisite(s): AMST 1800 or ENGL 1200 or HIST 1000 or HIST 1100 or HIST 1400 or HIST 1500
Meets General Education Requirement(s): AIA, DP, HI
prerequisites: AMST 1800 or ENGL 1200 or HIST 1000 or HIST 1100 or HIST 1400 or HIST 1500
